OWASP_A03_INJECTION.default: An injection attempt was detected. User-supplied input flowed into a sensitive sink without sanitization. Review your input validation path and apply parameterized queries or output encoding.

ZOD_VALIDATION_FAILED.default: Input did not match the expected schema. Check the field types listed in the validation error and adjust the payload, or update the schema if the new shape is intentional.

AUTH_REQUIRED.default: This action requires you to be signed in. Run `claude login` (or your project's equivalent) and retry.

FILE_NOT_FOUND.technical: ENOENT: file or directory not found
FILE_NOT_FOUND.default: The target file does not exist. Verify the path is correct and that the file has not been moved or deleted.

PERMISSION_DENIED.default: The current user lacks permission to access this resource. Adjust file permissions or run with appropriate privileges.

NETWORK_TIMEOUT.default: The remote endpoint did not respond in time. Check your network connection, then retry. If the problem persists the upstream service may be degraded.

PARSE_ERROR.default: The content could not be parsed. Verify the format (JSON / YAML / TOML) and check for trailing commas, unescaped quotes, or wrong indentation.

CC_VERSION_MISMATCH.default: Your installed Claude Code is older than bkit recommends. Update via the Claude Code marketplace to unlock the gated features listed in the warning.

UNKNOWN_ERROR.default: An unexpected error occurred. Check the underlying technical message above; if it persists, capture the surrounding logs and open an issue.
